title: PolicyDecision
description: A policy decision made in response to an action proposal.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this policy decision.

action_id.description: The action proposal this decision applies to.

run_id.description: The run this decision belongs to.

result.description: The outcome of the policy evaluation.

policy_name.description: Name of the policy that produced this decision.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this decision was made.

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was made.

deterministic_fingerprint.description: A stable hash of the policy inputs, used for integrity verification.

trace_id.description: Optional reference to the PolicyEvaluationTrace for this decision.
